positive: A stylish, highly detailed monochrome silhouette of a whimsical raccoon wearing a bowtie, perched on a vintage teacup filled with glowing steam. The raccoon is engaged in reading a miniature, oversized book, and the teacup radiates soft, magical light. The composition is central and balanced, designed for maximum contrast on dark fabric. Style: Nordic folklore engraving meets modern vector illustration. Details: High level of intricate line work, crisp edges, clean negative space, isolated elements. Lighting: Dramatic chiaroscuro with glowing internal light sources. Color direction: Predominantly black lines and solid white fill areas, emphasizing strong contrast. Aspect Ratio: Square and centered.
negative: blur, grainy, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifacts, extra limbs, malformed, disfigured, cartoonish, photorealistic, low detail
